calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-08-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:11am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Panagiotis Zavvari appears in pro per with Ann Ching. Respondent, Vivek Krishnan appears in pro per with Kingsley Lara.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

The check that had been admitted into evidence previously is returned to Mr. Zavvari; the envelope that it was in has been signed for receipt and remains in the file.

9:44am
Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
